tools.name: wcag_audit
tools.description: Run a full axe-core audit against one or more URLs. Returns violation counts by severity (minor, moderate, serious, critical) per URL. Serious or critical > 0 means fail per Dynasty quality floor.

tools.name: lighthouse_run
tools.description: Run Lighthouse mobile against a URL. Returns scores for performance, accessibility, best-practices, SEO (each 0-100). Use the mobile profile — Dynasty floors are calibrated on mobile. Desktop mode is for debugging only.

tools.name: schema_validate
tools.description: Fetch a URL and validate schema.org JSON-LD or microdata. Returns which schema types are present, missing, and invalid. Dynasty floor: home page must have Organization + LocalBusiness.

tools.name: functional_test
tools.description: Hit a list of routes and assert status + (optional) response shape. Routes come from the plan's acceptance checklist. Response-shape check is a JSON schema or a simple key-exists check.

tools.name: security_headers_check
tools.description: Check for CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy on a URL. Missing headers are warnings, NOT failures — Dynasty floor is quality, not enterprise compliance (that comes in Phase 4 hardening).

tools.name: emit_halt
tools.description: Halt per halt-conditions or escalation policy. An audit returning 'fail' is NOT a halt — it's a normal submit with verdict=fail and a remediation recommendation.

tools.name: submit_results
tools.description: Return audit verdicts per the submit contract in loop.txt. Overall verdict is fail if any category is fail; warn if any is warn and none is fail; else pass.
